name: weatherv1-next
description: WeatherV1 local desktop video production app
author: Barmoshe

scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run standalone:prep && electron-forge package
scripts.electron:make: npm run build && npm run standalone:prep && electron-forge make
scripts.notebooklm:export:chunks: mkdir -p notebooklm-dist && repomix -c repomix.notebooklm-docs.json && repomix -c repomix.notebooklm-server.json && repomix -c repomix.notebooklm-app.json && repomix -c repomix.notebooklm-tooling.json
scripts.notebooklm:export:chunks:txt: mkdir -p notebooklm-dist && repomix -c repomix.notebooklm-docs.json -o notebooklm-dist/chunk-01-docs.txt --style plain && repomix -c repomix.notebooklm-server.json -o notebooklm-dist/chunk-02-src-server.txt --style plain && repomix -c repomix.notebooklm-app.json -o notebooklm-dist/chunk-03-src-app-client-tests.txt --style plain && repomix -c repomix.notebooklm-tooling.json -o notebooklm-dist/chunk-04-electron-scripts-infra.txt --style plain
